name: ALMA Vortex Momentum Capture
edge_hypothesis: ALMA (Arnaud Legoux Moving Average) uses a Gaussian-weighted smoothing kernel that reduces lag compared to EMA while filtering more noise than SMA. ALMA has never been tested as a baseline in any ACCEPT-tier strategy, yet it should provide cleaner trend direction signals. Paired with Vortex indicator — the backbone of the #1 strategy (Vortex v3a PF=2.034) — this combines an untested smooth baseline with a proven directional momentum filter. The hypothesis: ALMA's superior smoothing + Vortex directional confirmation = high-quality trend entries with fewer whipsaws than EMA-based approaches.

variants.name: alma_vortex_v1_8to1
variants.description: Price above ALMA confirms uptrend direction. Vortex positive exceeding negative confirms directional momentum. 8:1 R:R at the proven sweet spot with tight 1.5 ATR stop.

components.notes: Gaussian-weighted MA — smoother and lower-lag than EMA. Untested baseline in any ACCEPT.
Vortex positive index — proven directional momentum in #1 strategy.
Vortex negative index — cross-referenced against VTXP for directional bias.

variants.name: alma_vortex_v2_wide_10to1
variants.description: Same ALMA+Vortex logic but with wider stop (2.0 ATR) and higher R:R (10:1). Tests whether giving trades more room to breathe improves hit rate enough to offset reduced frequency.

indicator_roles.baseline: ALMA_9_6.0_0.85 — Gaussian-weighted moving average, smoother than EMA with less lag
indicator_roles.confirmation: VTXP_14 vs VTXM_14 — directional momentum from Vortex indicator family
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — adaptive position sizing and risk management
